prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.6 kg; Height 184.2 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 246mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 248mg/dL; current 183mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.7kg; 9 months ago 72.1kg; 6 months ago 70.2kg; 3 months ago 74.9kg; current 72.6kg), Height (12 months ago 184.2cm; 9 months ago 184.2cm; 6 months ago 184.2cm; 3 months ago 184.2cm; current 184.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 94U/L; 3 months ago 94U/L; current 91U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.8mg/dL; current 1.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; current 10mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 488mg/g; 9 months ago 518mg/g; 6 months ago 587mg/g; 3 months ago 859mg/g; current 773mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 67mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.21 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
